courses.title: Beginner's Astrology Course
courses.one_liner: Master the fundamentals of Vedic Astrology and start your journey as a confident astrologer.
why_choose: Structured Foundation Learning – Step-by-step beginner-friendly curriculum.
Practical Chart Reading – Real horoscope analysis practice.
Career-Oriented Training – Learn to consult professionally.
Expert Mentorship Support – Guidance from Acharya LavBhushan Ji.
Simplified Teaching Method – Complex concepts made easy.
Live Case Discussions – Real-life example based learning.
Doubt Clearing Sessions – Interactive learning support.
Certification Included – Professional course completion certificate.
courses.description: This course is specially designed for beginners who wish to build a strong foundation in Vedic Astrology. You will learn about zodiac signs, planets, houses, and how they influence human life. The course explains horoscope reading in a simplified and practical way. With real chart examples and live discussions, students gain clarity and confidence. Whether you want personal knowledge or professional growth, this program prepares you step by step. By the end of the course, you will be able to read basic birth charts independently and give meaningful guidance.

faqs.question: I have zero knowledge of astrology — is this course really suitable for a complete beginner?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! This course is specifically designed keeping beginners in mind. We start from the very basics — what astrology is, how a birth chart works, and gradually move into understanding planets, signs, and houses. No prior knowledge is required whatsoever.

faqs.question: Will I be able to read my own birth chart after completing this course?
faqs.answer: Yes, by the end of the course you will have enough foundational knowledge to read and interpret your own birth chart. You will understand the significance of your rising sign, planetary positions, and key life themes reflected in your horoscope.

faqs.question: How long will it take to complete the Beginner's Astrology Course?
faqs.answer: The course is self-paced, so you can go at your own comfort. On average, most students complete it within 4 to 6 weeks spending a few hours each week. You get lifetime access, so there is no pressure to rush.

faqs.question: Is there any live support available if I get stuck or have doubts?
faqs.answer: Yes, students get access to our doubt-clearing sessions and a dedicated support community where our faculty members regularly answer queries. You will never feel alone on your learning journey.

faqs.question: Can this course help me start a career in astrology or is it only for personal use?
faqs.answer: This beginner course lays a very strong foundation that you can later build upon with our advanced programs. Many of our students who started here have gone on to become practising astrologers. If your goal is a career, this is the right first step.

reviews.name: Priya Sharma
reviews.review: I had zero knowledge of astrology before joining this course. The way each concept is explained — from the basics of the zodiac to understanding planetary positions — is so clear and systematic. I feel like a completely different person now. Highly recommend to anyone curious about astrology!

reviews.name: Rohit Agarwal
reviews.review: This course is a gem for beginners. The faculty explains even complicated topics in simple Hindi and gives practical examples from daily life. After completing this course, I can now read my own birth chart and guide my family members. Worth every rupee invested.

reviews.name: Sunita Mehta
reviews.review: A very well-structured course for anyone starting their astrology journey. The content is rich, and the recorded sessions are easy to revisit. I especially loved the live doubt-clearing sessions. My only suggestion would be to add more practice exercises, but overall it is an excellent starting point.

courses.title: Personal Details Correction Course
courses.one_liner: Learn how correcting personal details can positively influence destiny and life outcomes.
why_choose: Result-Oriented Approach – Focus on practical improvements.
Energy Alignment Techniques – Balance life vibrations effectively.
Real Case Examples – Learn from real transformations.
Professional Application Skills – Start consulting confidently.
Scientific Numerology Base – Logical explanation methods.
Stepwise Correction Process – Clear structured methodology.
Practical Assignments Included – Hands-on learning model.
Certification Support – Professional validation provided.
courses.description: This course focuses on correcting personal details like name, signature, and other numerological aspects to improve life outcomes. You will understand how vibrations influence success, relationships, and growth. The program includes practical correction methods and real case studies. It equips you with professional consultation skills. Ideal for those who want to help others overcome obstacles through structured correction techniques.

faqs.question: What does 'Personal Details Correction' include — what all is covered in this course?
faqs.answer: This comprehensive course covers the correction and alignment of multiple personal identifiers — your name, mobile number, email ID, signature, and other personal details — all analysed and optimised through numerology to create a harmonious, success-attracting energy profile.

faqs.question: Why should all personal details be aligned together rather than correcting them separately?
faqs.answer: When all your personal identifiers vibrate in harmony with your core numbers, the combined effect is far more powerful than correcting just one element. This course teaches you to build a cohesive numerological profile that works synergistically across all life areas.

faqs.question: Is this course suitable for someone who has already done the Name or Mobile Correction courses?
faqs.answer: Yes, this course goes a level deeper and broader. If you have done either, you will find this consolidates and significantly expands that knowledge, covering additional elements and advanced correction methods.

faqs.question: Can I use this course to offer a premium 'full profile correction' service to clients?
faqs.answer: Absolutely — in fact, that is one of its primary purposes. Personal Details Correction is a high-value service that clients are willing to pay a premium for. This course gives you the expertise to position yourself as a specialist in this niche.

faqs.question: Does the course provide templates or tools to help me calculate and present corrections to clients?
faqs.answer: Yes, the course includes structured calculation frameworks, ready-to-use templates, and a consultation presentation format so you can deliver polished, professional reports to your clients with confidence.

reviews.name: Hemant Shukla
reviews.review: This is a complete package — name, mobile, vehicle number, and more all covered under one course. After implementing the corrections suggested by this course, I experienced a significant positive shift in my career and relationships within months.

reviews.name: Rekha Sharma
reviews.review: Comprehensive, detailed, and life-changing. The Personal Details Correction Course teaches you how to align every key number in your life with your core numerological blueprint. I feel more in control of my destiny after completing this.

reviews.name: Ajay Bhatnagar
reviews.review: Very thorough course that covers all the important personal numbers. The interaction sessions were particularly helpful for clarifying doubts. Overall this is a highly valuable course for anyone wanting to use numerology as a holistic life tool.

courses.title: All About Rashis
courses.one_liner: Deeply understand all 12 zodiac signs and their complete life impact.
why_choose: Complete Zodiac Mastery – All signs explained deeply.
Practical Personality Reading – Understand behavioral patterns.
Compatibility Understanding Skills – Relationship analysis methods.
Prediction Enhancement Knowledge – Stronger horoscope reading.
Structured Rashi Analysis – Clear sign-by-sign explanation.
Professional Consultation Ready – Apply instantly in practice.
Expert Teaching Style – Easy yet powerful explanation.
Certification Included – Recognition for completion.
courses.description: This specialized course focuses entirely on the 12 zodiac signs and their detailed interpretation. You will understand each Rashi's personality traits, strengths, weaknesses, and life patterns. The course enhances your ability to analyze compatibility, career direction, and behavioral tendencies. It is ideal for astrologers who want deeper clarity in sign-based predictions and consultation.

faqs.question: Does this course cover all 12 Rashis in detail or just a few?
faqs.answer: This course covers all 12 Rashis comprehensively — their ruling planets, elemental nature, core personality traits, strengths, weaknesses, and compatibility patterns. Each Rashi gets dedicated focused content.

faqs.question: What is the difference between a Sun sign and a Moon sign Rashi?
faqs.answer: This is one of the key concepts covered in the course. In Vedic astrology, your Rashi typically refers to your Moon sign — the sign the Moon was in at your birth — which differs from the Western Sun sign system. The course clearly explains both and their significance.

faqs.question: Is this course standalone or do I need to take the Beginner's Astrology Course first?
faqs.answer: The All About Rashis course is designed as a standalone module that can be studied independently. However, combining it with the Beginner's Astrology Course gives you a much richer and more complete learning experience.

faqs.question: Will I learn how Rashis affect relationships and compatibility?
faqs.answer: Yes, the course includes a section on inter-Rashi compatibility — which signs are naturally harmonious, which create friction, and why. This is extremely useful for understanding personal and professional relationships through an astrological lens.

faqs.question: How is this course delivered — are there videos, PDFs, or live classes?
faqs.answer: The course is delivered through pre-recorded video lectures supported by downloadable PDF notes and reference material. You can access everything at your convenience on any device, at any time after enrollment.

reviews.name: Kavita Joshi
reviews.review: A focused, to-the-point course on all 12 Rashis. I enrolled expecting basic information but got so much more. Amazing value for just Rs. 1,499. I finished it in a weekend and loved every session.

reviews.name: Manish Tiwari
reviews.review: The way the teacher explains each Rashi with real-life characters and stories makes it very easy to remember. Now I can identify traits, predict behavior, and relate Rashis to horoscope readings confidently. Superb short course!

reviews.name: Nidhi Bansal
reviews.review: Very informative and compact course. The course is ideal for someone who wants to build a strong foundation before moving to advanced astrology topics. Great effort by the Astro Vastu Gurukul team.

courses.title: All About Planets
courses.one_liner: Master the influence of all 9 planets and their role in shaping destiny.
why_choose: Planetary Depth Knowledge – Understand cosmic influences clearly.
Prediction Accuracy Boost – Improve forecasting precision.
Advanced Interpretation Skills – Detailed planetary reading.
Career Enhancement Learning – Stronger consultation abilities.
Clear Concept Explanation – Simplified advanced concepts.
Practical Horoscope Study – Real chart analysis.
Professional Guidance Skills – Apply in real life.
Certification Provided – Professional recognition.
courses.description: This course provides in-depth knowledge of all nine planets in Vedic Astrology. You will learn their nature, strength, aspects, and placement effects. Understanding planetary combinations helps improve prediction accuracy. The course is ideal for astrologers seeking mastery in planetary interpretation and professional growth.

faqs.question: How many planets are covered in this course — only the main ones or shadow planets too?
faqs.answer: The course covers all nine planets used in Vedic astrology — the seven classical planets (Sun, Moon, Mars, Mercury, Jupiter, Venus, Saturn) as well as the shadow planets Rahu and Ketu. Each is studied in detail.

faqs.question: Will this course explain what it means when a planet is strong or weak in a chart?
faqs.answer: Yes, planetary strength is a key topic. You will learn about exaltation, debilitation, own sign placement, and friendly or enemy signs — all the factors that determine how powerfully a planet expresses itself in a horoscope.

faqs.question: Can I use this knowledge to understand current planetary transits and their effects?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Once you understand each planet's nature, significations, and characteristics from this course, you will be well-equipped to interpret how planetary transits affect daily life — one of the most practical applications of astrology.

faqs.question: Is the content based on Vedic astrology or Western astrology?
faqs.answer: The course is rooted in Vedic (Jyotish) astrology principles, which is the traditional Indian system. While some parallels with Western astrology are drawn for better understanding, the primary framework is Vedic.

faqs.question: Do I need to know how to draw a birth chart before taking this course?
faqs.answer: No, prior chart-drawing knowledge is not needed. The course focuses on understanding planetary nature, qualities, and significations. You can take this as a standalone module or alongside other beginner courses for best results.

reviews.name: Arun Pandey
reviews.review: Understanding planets is the backbone of astrology, and this course nails it completely. From Sun to Rahu and Ketu, each planet's nature, strength, relationships, and effects are explained beautifully. Absolutely brilliant!

reviews.name: Deepa Verma
reviews.review: I was always confused about planetary periods and their effects on life events. This course cleared everything so well. A must-have course for every astrology learner.

reviews.name: Sameer Kulkarni
reviews.review: Excellent course on planetary characteristics. For Rs. 1,499 this is unbeatable content. The sessions themselves are fantastic.

courses.title: All About Houses
courses.one_liner: Understand all 12 houses and decode every life area through horoscope analysis.
why_choose: Life Area Clarity – Decode every life domain.
Prediction Strength Improvement – Sharper analysis methods.
House Lord Mastery – Advanced interpretation skills.
Career Consultation Growth – Practical application knowledge.
Real Chart Practice – Live examples included.
Structured Bhava Learning – Step-by-step explanation.
Professional Approach Training – Consult confidently.
Completion Certification – Recognized course certificate.
courses.description: This course focuses on understanding the 12 houses of a birth chart and their impact on different life areas. You will learn how each house influences career, wealth, relationships, health, and destiny. With practical examples and structured learning, you gain clarity in bhava-based predictions and consultations.

faqs.question: What exactly will I learn about the 12 houses in this course?
faqs.answer: You will learn the significations of all 12 houses — what each house represents in terms of life areas such as self, wealth, siblings, home, children, health, relationships, transformation, and career. You will also learn how planets behave when placed in different houses.

faqs.question: How do the houses relate to the Rashis and planets I may have already studied?
faqs.answer: Houses, Rashis, and planets form the three pillars of chart interpretation. This course shows you how to integrate all three — the house sets the stage, the Rashi colours the energy, and the planet acts within that space to create life events and personality patterns.

faqs.question: Will I learn about the Ascendant (Lagna) and how it affects the house system?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Ascendant or Lagna is covered as the foundation of the entire house system. You will understand why the Ascendant is considered the most important point in a chart and how it shapes the entire interpretation of all 12 houses.

faqs.question: Is this course practical enough for me to start reading charts after completing it?
faqs.answer: This course, when combined with our Rashis and Planets modules, gives you a solid framework to begin basic chart readings. The All About Houses course completes the trio of essential building blocks needed for horoscope interpretation.

faqs.question: Are there any assignments or practice exercises included in this course?
faqs.answer: Yes, each module comes with practice exercises and sample chart examples to help you apply what you have learned. This hands-on approach ensures that the knowledge is not just theoretical but genuinely usable.

reviews.name: Pooja Rastogi
reviews.review: The 12 houses of the horoscope used to confuse me so much. After this course, reading a birth chart feels so much more intuitive to me now.

reviews.name: Vikas Soni
reviews.review: Brilliant course. Short, sharp, and impactful — perfect for anyone building their astrology knowledge one block at a time.

reviews.name: Lalita Chaudhary
reviews.review: I paired this with the Rashis and Planets courses and the combination is incredibly powerful. Total game changer.

courses.title: Advanced Astrology Course
courses.one_liner: Master advanced Vedic Astrology techniques and develop the expertise to deliver accurate, confident, and professional-level predictions.
why_choose: Advanced Predictive Mastery – Sharpen your forecasting accuracy.
Deep Chart Interpretation – Understand complex combinations clearly.
Professional Consultation Skills – Handle real clients confidently.
Practical Case Analysis – Work on real horoscope examples.
Dasha System Clarity – Time events accurately.
Advanced Yogas Understanding – Decode powerful planetary combinations.
Career-Focused Training – Build professional authority.
Globally Recognized Certification – Enhance your credibility worldwide.
courses.description: The Advanced Astrology Course is designed for students who already understand the basics and want to elevate their predictive abilities to a professional level. This program covers advanced horoscope analysis, divisional charts, dashas, yogas, and transit interpretation in depth. You will learn how to accurately predict career growth, marriage timing, financial stability, and major life events. With real case studies and practical chart discussions, the course strengthens analytical thinking and consultation confidence.

faqs.question: What level of prior knowledge is required to enroll in the Advance Astrology Course?
faqs.answer: You should have a solid understanding of the basics — Rashis, planets, and houses. Ideally, completing our Beginner's Astrology Course or equivalent knowledge is recommended. This program picks up where the basics leave off and goes into professional-level depth.

faqs.question: Does this course cover predictive techniques like Dasha systems and transits?
faqs.answer: Yes, predictive astrology is a major focus. The course covers the Vimshottari Dasha system in detail, Ashtottari Dasha, planetary transits, Yogas, and their combined application for accurate life event prediction.

faqs.question: Will I learn about divisional charts (Vargas) in this course?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Divisional charts are a key component of advanced Vedic astrology and are covered extensively — including the Navamsa, Dashamsa, Saptamsa, and others, along with how to integrate them with the main birth chart for deeper analysis.

faqs.question: Can this course prepare me to offer professional astrology consultations?
faqs.answer: Yes, this course is designed to bring you to a consultation-ready standard. You will learn structured chart reading methodology, client communication frameworks, and how to give clear, ethical, and actionable astrological guidance.

faqs.question: Is there mentorship or personal feedback available during this advanced program?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Advance Astrology Course includes mentorship sessions where faculty review student chart readings and provide personalised feedback. This guided practice is invaluable for developing real-world consultation skills.

reviews.name: Dr. Rajesh Mishra
reviews.review: This Advance Astrology Course took my understanding to a completely different level. Topics like Ashtakvarga, Jaimini, and predictive techniques are covered with a depth I have never encountered in any other program. Truly a masterclass.

reviews.name: Archana Dixit
reviews.review: The advanced course is worth every single paisa. I have already started doing chart readings for clients after completing this course, and the feedback has been wonderful. This course changed my professional life.

reviews.name: Suresh Nair
reviews.review: Exceptional quality, exceptional faculty, and exceptional content. If you are serious about becoming a professional astrologer, this is the course that will define your practice.

courses.title: Numerology Course for Beginners
courses.one_liner: Learn the science of numbers and decode life patterns through numerology.
why_choose: Strong Foundation Learning – Beginner-friendly structured course.
Practical Application Focus – Use numbers professionally.
Energy Vibration Understanding – Scientific explanation approach.
Consultation Ready Training – Start guiding clients.
Real Case Studies – Practical exposure.
Simple Teaching Method – Easy to understand.
Career Building Skills – Professional growth support.
Certification Included – Professional recognition.
courses.description: This beginner course introduces the powerful science of numerology. You will learn how numbers influence personality, career, relationships, and success. With practical case studies and real-life applications, the course helps you understand life path numbers, destiny numbers, and name corrections.

faqs.question: I have never studied numerology before — will this course be easy to follow?
faqs.answer: Yes, this course is built from the ground up for complete beginners. You will start with what numbers mean in numerology, how to calculate core numbers like Life Path, Destiny, and Soul Urge, and what they reveal about a person's character and life journey.

faqs.question: Which system of numerology is taught — Chaldean, Pythagorean, or Indian?
faqs.answer: The course primarily focuses on the Chaldean numerology system, which is considered the most ancient and accurate. We also introduce key elements of the Indian numerology tradition, giving you a well-rounded foundational understanding.

faqs.question: Can I use numerology to understand my own life purpose after this course?
faqs.answer: Yes, one of the most exciting takeaways is calculating and interpreting your own core numbers — Life Path, Expression Number, and Birthday Number — which together reveal your strengths, challenges, and life purpose.

faqs.question: How long does the beginner numerology course take to complete?
faqs.answer: The course is compact and focused, designed to be completed in 2 to 3 weeks at a relaxed pace. It is an excellent starting point and pairs naturally with our Name Correction and Mobile Number Correction courses.

faqs.question: Is there a certificate awarded after completing this course?
faqs.answer: Yes, upon successful completion of the course you will receive a certificate from Astro Vastu Gurukul, which you can use to demonstrate your knowledge and begin basic numerology consultations or readings.

reviews.name: Ritu Gupta
reviews.review: I always had curiosity about numerology but never knew where to start. This beginner's course is the perfect entry point. Finished it in just two days and felt so enlightened!

reviews.name: Ankit Sharma
reviews.review: Solid introductory course. At Rs. 1,499 this is exceptional value. I had no prior background and yet understood everything clearly.

reviews.name: Vandana Tripathi
reviews.review: Such a wonderful introduction to the world of numbers! The teacher's enthusiasm is infectious and makes learning so enjoyable. Highly recommended.

courses.title: Name Correction Course
courses.one_liner: Master the powerful science of name correction and learn how aligning name vibrations can attract success, growth, and stability in life.
why_choose: Scientific Correction Methods – Structured and logical approach.
Result-Oriented Techniques – Focus on life improvement.
Business Application Skills – Apply for brands & companies.
Professional Consulting Training – Start offering services confidently.
Practical Case Discussions – Real transformation examples.
Energy Alignment Clarity – Understand vibration science deeply.
Expert Guidance Support – Learn from Acharya LavBhushan Ji.
Recognized Certification Provided – Professional credibility boost.
courses.description: This course focuses on the science and practical application of name correction through numerology principles. You will learn how name vibrations influence career growth, relationships, financial stability, and overall success. The program covers step-by-step spelling correction methods and alignment with destiny numbers.

faqs.question: What exactly is name correction and how does it work in numerology?
faqs.answer: Name correction involves analysing the numerical value of the letters in a person's name and adjusting the spelling so the total aligns positively with their birth number and life path number. This alignment is believed to attract success, harmony, and positive opportunities.

faqs.question: Will this course teach me to correct names for clients professionally?
faqs.answer: Yes, the course is designed to make you fully capable of performing professional name correction consultations. You will learn calculation methods, correction techniques, and how to communicate recommendations clearly to clients.

faqs.question: Is this applicable only to personal names or also for business names?
faqs.answer: Both! The same numerological principles apply to business names, brand names, and product names. A well-aligned business name can significantly impact growth and success, and the course covers these applications thoroughly.

faqs.question: Does changing the spelling of a name actually make a difference in real life?
faqs.answer: Numerology practitioners believe it does — the vibration of a name shapes how the world responds to a person. Countless real-life case studies from our faculty and alumni support the positive impact of numerologically aligned names.

faqs.question: How is this course different from the basic numerology course?
faqs.answer: The Beginner's Numerology Course gives you foundational knowledge of numbers. The Name Correction Course is a specialised, application-focused program that teaches you a specific high-demand skill — ideal for those wanting to offer a distinct numerology service.

reviews.name: Pallavi Singh
reviews.review: Name correction changed my daughter's academic performance and overall confidence. Scientifically explained, practically applicable, and deeply impactful.

reviews.name: Nitin Bhatt
reviews.review: One of the most practical numerology courses I have attended. I now offer name correction services to my clients and the results they report are remarkable.

reviews.name: Seema Kapoor
reviews.review: Very insightful course on the power of names and their numerological vibrations. The core content is excellent and highly useful for professional numerologists.

courses.one_liner: Learn how mobile numbers impact personal energy fields and how correcting them can attract better opportunities, smoother communication, and positive outcomes.
why_choose: Unique Modern Application – Modern numerology practice.

Professional Consultation Ready – Offer services confidently.

courses.description: This specialized course explores the influence of mobile numbers on personal energy vibrations. You will understand how certain number combinations can enhance or disturb life flow. The course teaches how to analyze and correct mobile numbers for career growth, better communication, and smoother relationships.

faqs.question: Can a mobile number really affect a person's life and energy?
faqs.answer: Yes, according to numerology every number carries a specific vibrational frequency. Your mobile number is something you interact with daily — making its energetic alignment with your personal numbers very significant for opportunities and relationships.

faqs.question: Will I learn how to suggest the right mobile number for a specific person?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. The course teaches you step-by-step how to calculate a person's numerology profile and then match or recommend a mobile number that aligns with their Life Path, Destiny, or Name Number for maximum positive energy.

faqs.question: Is this course useful for both personal use and professional numerology practice?
faqs.answer: Yes — whether you want to correct your own number or offer mobile number analysis as a paid service to clients, this course equips you with both the knowledge and the framework to do so confidently.

faqs.question: Do I need to complete the Beginner's Numerology Course before enrolling here?
faqs.answer: It is highly recommended to complete the Beginner's Numerology Course first, as it covers the foundational concepts this course builds upon. However, if you already have numerology basics, you can join directly.

faqs.question: What kind of results have people seen after correcting their mobile numbers?
faqs.answer: Many clients report improved communication, better business opportunities, and a general sense of things flowing more smoothly after aligning their mobile numbers. Numerological alignment is a powerful tool widely used by practitioners around the world.

reviews.name: Harsh Agarwal
reviews.review: I had no idea that my mobile number could be affecting my business and personal life. After this course, I corrected my number and within weeks I noticed a visible improvement in incoming calls and business opportunities.

reviews.name: Meera Jain
reviews.review: Fascinating course! The correction techniques are simple, effective, and immediately applicable. Loved every session.

reviews.name: Tarun Malhotra
reviews.review: Very unique and practical course. The course is well-structured with examples and case studies. A very valuable skill to add to any numerology or counseling practice.

courses.description: The Advanced Numerology Course covers Lo Shu Grid, pyramids, compound numbers, personal year cycles, karmic numbers, and pinnacle cycles in exceptional depth. Students gain professional-grade skills for client consultations, compatibility analysis, and business name selection.

faqs.question: How is the Advance Numerology Course different from the beginner level?
faqs.answer: The Advance Numerology Course dives into complex systems like Lo Shu Grid analysis, Yantra numerology, deeper name analysis techniques, annual and monthly number forecasting, and advanced compatibility mapping — topics not touched in the beginner course.

faqs.question: Will I learn predictive numerology — forecasting future trends for clients?
faqs.answer: Yes, predictive numerology is a major component. You will learn Personal Year, Month, and Day cycles, Peak Cycles, Challenge Numbers, and how to map out significant life periods for clients — a highly sought-after consultation skill.

faqs.question: Does this course cover Lo Shu Grid and its practical applications?
faqs.answer: Yes, Lo Shu Grid is covered in depth — from constructing the grid to interpreting missing numbers, repeated numbers, and arrows of strength and weakness. It is one of the most powerful and visually compelling tools in advanced numerology.

faqs.question: Can I combine this knowledge with astrology or Vastu for a more complete consultation?
faqs.answer: Definitely. Numerology pairs beautifully with astrology and Vastu. The course includes guidance on how to integrate numerological findings with other metaphysical tools to offer clients a holistic, multi-dimensional consultation experience.

faqs.question: Will I receive mentorship and feedback on my practice readings during this course?
faqs.answer: Yes, advanced students have access to mentorship sessions where faculty review your practice analyses. This personalised feedback loop is essential for moving from theoretical understanding to genuine professional expertise.

reviews.name: Kiran Rao
reviews.review: The Advance Numerology Course is simply extraordinary. I enrolled as an intermediate numerology learner and finished as a confident professional. Life-changing course.

reviews.name: Sangeeta Yadav
reviews.review: From Lo Shu Grid analysis to karmic numbers and pinnacle cycles — this course covers everything an advanced numerologist needs to know. Truly professional-grade content.

reviews.name: Prakash Dubey
reviews.review: Absolutely worth the investment. The live sessions, recorded videos, and reference material together create an unbeatable learning experience. Strongly recommended!

courses.title: Basic Vastu Shastra Course
courses.one_liner: Understand the core principles of Vastu Shastra and learn how to balance home and workplace energies to attract harmony, prosperity, and success.
why_choose: Traditional Knowledge Base – Authentic Vastu principles.
Practical Remedy Approach – Simple correction solutions.
Home & Office Application – Residential and commercial clarity.
Energy Balancing Techniques – Create harmonious spaces.
Real Layout Case Studies – Practical learning experience.
Professional Career Scope – Start Vastu consultancy.
Structured Stepwise Training – Beginner-friendly format.
Certification Recognition Provided – Boost professional credibility.
courses.description: This foundational Vastu course provides deep insight into the ancient science of spatial energy balance. You will learn how directions, elements, and placements influence health, wealth, and harmony. The program includes residential and commercial Vastu principles along with practical remedies.

faqs.question: I am planning to buy a new home — will this course help me evaluate the property?
faqs.answer: Yes, this is one of the most practical benefits of the Beginner's Vastu Course. You will learn how to assess a property's direction, plot shape, entry placement, and key zone layout before making a purchase — knowledge that can save you from costly Vastu defects.

faqs.question: What are the basic Vastu principles I will learn in this course?
faqs.answer: You will learn the five elements and their zones, the significance of directions and their ruling energies, guidelines for room placement (bedroom, kitchen, pooja room), entrance Vastu, and simple remedies for common defects — all explained in a clear, beginner-friendly manner.

faqs.question: Is this course relevant for apartments or only for independent houses?
faqs.answer: This course is relevant for all types of residential spaces — apartments, flats, independent houses, and even rented homes. The principles are applied differently based on the space available, and the course covers practical guidance for each scenario.

faqs.question: How soon can I start applying what I learn in this course to my own home?
faqs.answer: You can start applying basic Vastu observations from as early as the first few modules. Many students rearrange furniture, identify their home's main direction, and make simple corrections during the course itself — the learning is immediately practical.

faqs.question: Does this beginner course prepare me for the advanced Vastu courses at Astro Vastu Gurukul?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Beginner's Vastu Course is the ideal foundation for our Residential Advance Vastu Course and specialised programs like 45 Devta and Commercial & Industrial Vastu. Think of it as your gateway into the world of professional Vastu.

reviews.name: Ananya Mishra
reviews.review: I enrolled in this course before buying a new flat and it was the best decision I made. Now I can assess any property with confidence. Excellent course at a very affordable price.

reviews.name: Girish Patel
reviews.review: Great entry-level Vastu course. Perfect for homeowners and anyone curious about Vastu. Affordable, well-structured, and taught with a lot of clarity.

reviews.name: Swati Dubey
reviews.review: By the end of it, I rearranged a few things in my home and the energy of the house genuinely felt different. Highly recommended for everyone!

courses.title: 45 Devta Course
courses.one_liner: Unlock the cosmic power of 45 divine energies to create spaces that attract prosperity, health, and harmony.
why_choose: Ancient Wisdom – Rooted in authentic Vedic scriptures and classical Vastu texts.
Rare Knowledge – One of the few structured courses covering all 45 Devtas in detail.
Practical Application – Learn to map deities directly on actual floor plans and plots.
Remedy Focused – Every concept is paired with actionable corrections and remedies.
Expert Faculty – Taught by experienced Vastu Acharyas from Astro Vastu Gurukul.
Flexible Learning – Study at your own pace with recorded sessions and study material.
Certificate Awarded – Receive an officially recognized certificate upon completion.
Community Access – Join an exclusive group of Vastu practitioners for ongoing support.
courses.description: The 45 Devta Course is a profound journey into the spiritual architecture of Vastu Shastra. At the heart of every space lies a divine grid of 45 cosmic energies — each deity governing a specific zone, direction, and life aspect. This course decodes each of these 45 Devtas, their positions in the Vastu Purusha Mandala, and their direct influence on the health, wealth, relationships, and career of the occupants.
who_its_for: Vastu enthusiasts wanting to deepen their spiritual understanding
Beginners looking for a structured entry into advanced Vastu
Astrologers and healers wishing to add Vastu to their practice
Homeowners seeking deeper insight into their living space
Students of Indian sacred sciences and Vedic architecture

faqs.question: What exactly is the Vastu Purusha Mandala and why are the 45 Devtas important?
faqs.answer: The Vastu Purusha Mandala is a sacred energy grid that forms the energetic blueprint of any space. Each of the 81 squares in this grid is governed by one of 45 divine energies (Devtas), and understanding which deity controls which zone is key to advanced Vastu analysis and correction.

faqs.question: Is this course suitable for someone who has only done the Beginner's Vastu Course?
faqs.answer: Yes, if you have completed the Beginner's Vastu Course, you are ready for the 45 Devta Course. It builds on foundational Vastu knowledge and elevates it to a deeply spiritual and precise level of analysis that sets professional consultants apart.

faqs.question: How will knowing the 45 Devtas make me a better Vastu consultant?
faqs.answer: Most Vastu consultants work at a surface level. Mastery of the 45 Devtas allows you to pinpoint exactly which divine energy is suppressed, connect it to the specific life problem the occupant faces, and prescribe highly targeted remedies — a level of precision clients deeply value.

faqs.question: Are the remedies in this course non-demolition or do they require structural changes?
faqs.answer: The course covers both structural guidance and non-demolition remedies. You will learn a range of correction options so you can offer practical solutions regardless of whether a client can make physical changes to the property.

faqs.question: Can I apply this course content to commercial spaces as well or is it only for homes?
faqs.answer: The Vastu Purusha Mandala and the 45 Devtas apply to all built spaces — residential, commercial, and industrial. The principles are universal, and the course includes examples from multiple property types to ensure versatile application.

reviews.name: Pankaj Upadhyay
reviews.review: The 45 Devta Course was a revelation. The course is unique, detailed, and rooted in authentic scriptural references. A rare gem in the world of Vastu education.

reviews.name: Aarti Deshpande
reviews.review: This course gave me a completely new dimension to my consultations. My clients are amazed at how precisely I can now identify the root cause of issues in their spaces.

reviews.name: Vivek Tiwari
reviews.review: Exceptional course that connects the spiritual and scientific aspects of Vastu seamlessly. I strongly recommend it to every serious Vastu practitioner.

High-Income Skill – Commercial Vastu consultations command the highest fees in the market.
Comprehensive Coverage – Covers offices, factories, warehouses, showrooms, and industrial plots.
Case Study Based – Learn through real-world case studies of successful Vastu transformations.
Consultant Ready – Equips you with tools and frameworks to start professional practice immediately.

who_its_for: Practicing Vastu consultants wanting to expand into the commercial segment

faqs.question: I run a manufacturing business — will this course actually help me improve my factory layout?
faqs.answer: Yes, the course covers factory and industrial Vastu in detail — including machinery placement, raw material storage zones, production flow direction, worker welfare areas, and financial corners. These principles can have a real and tangible impact on output, efficiency, and profitability.

faqs.question: Can a Vastu consultant really command high fees for commercial Vastu work?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Commercial and industrial Vastu is the highest-paying segment in the Vastu consulting industry. Business owners understand that getting the energy of a large commercial space right has enormous financial stakes — and they are willing to invest significantly in expert guidance.

faqs.question: Does the course cover how to handle large office complexes and multi-floor buildings?
faqs.answer: Yes, the course includes guidance on multi-storey commercial buildings, applying Vastu principles floor by floor, handling shared or leased office spaces, and how to prioritise corrections when not everything can be changed.

faqs.question: What kind of case studies are included in this course?
faqs.answer: The course features real-world case studies from offices, retail showrooms, factories, and warehouses — including before-and-after Vastu corrections and the outcomes clients experienced. These ground the learning in practical, relatable scenarios.

faqs.question: Is there a framework or checklist provided for doing commercial Vastu site visits?
faqs.answer: Yes, one of the most valuable resources in the course is the professional site visit checklist and consultation framework. This gives you a structured, systematic approach to assessing any commercial or industrial property — ensuring you never miss a critical Vastu factor.

reviews.name: Amit Singhania
reviews.review: The Commercial and Industrial Vastu Course is extremely practical. Since applying these principles, the productivity and morale in my factory have visibly improved.

reviews.name: Preethi Subramaniam
reviews.review: A phenomenal course for Vastu consultants looking to specialize in the commercial segment. This course has doubled my consultation fees because of the specialized expertise it gave me.

reviews.name: Gaurav Mehta
reviews.review: Very comprehensive and well-organized course on commercial Vastu. A strong course that is well worth the investment for any serious Vastu practitioner.

courses.one_liner: Go beyond the basics — master advanced residential Vastu techniques to transform homes into spaces of lasting peace, abundance, and positive energy.
why_choose: Advanced Level Content – Moves beyond beginner concepts into detailed, nuanced residential analysis.
Room-by-Room Mastery – In-depth study of every space in a home.

courses.description: The Residential Advance Vastu Course is designed for those with foundational Vastu knowledge ready to reach professional level. This advanced course takes you through a room-by-room, zone-by-zone analysis of residential spaces, covering plot selection, entry orientation, bedroom direction, kitchen placement, staircase positioning, and colour effects on energy flow.
who_its_for: Vastu practitioners ready to upgrade from basic to advanced practice
Homeowners wanting expert-level knowledge to evaluate their own home

Consultants wanting to specialize exclusively in residential Vastu

faqs.question: My house has several Vastu defects — will this course teach me how to fix them without demolition?
faqs.answer: Yes, non-demolition remedies are a core focus of this course. You will learn how to use colour therapy, mirror placement, elemental corrections, crystals, and furniture rearrangement to neutralise Vastu defects in a home without any structural changes.

faqs.question: How does the Residential Advance Course differ from the Beginner's Vastu Course?
faqs.answer: The beginner course gives you the fundamentals. This advanced course takes you into deeper territory — multi-level analysis, divisional Vastu zones, advanced remedies, preparation of professional Vastu reports, and specialised topics like staircase Vastu and underground water effects.

faqs.question: Will I learn about the effects of specific rooms like the master bedroom or kitchen in detail?
faqs.answer: Yes, each major room is covered in depth — master bedroom, children's room, kitchen, pooja room, bathroom, and study. You will understand ideal placement, common defects in each, and room-specific remedies that directly impact health, harmony, and prosperity.

faqs.question: How do I know if my home even has Vastu issues that need addressing?
faqs.answer: The course teaches you a complete home assessment methodology — from the main gate to every interior room. After completing this course, you will be able to walk through any home, identify its Vastu compliance level, and prepare a detailed report with prioritised recommendations.

faqs.question: Is the Residential Advance Vastu Course enough to become a full-time Vastu consultant for homes?
faqs.answer: This course, combined with the Beginner's Vastu Course and some hands-on practice, is absolutely sufficient to launch a residential Vastu consulting practice. Many successful full-time Vastu consultants have built their entire career on residential specialisation, and this course gives you everything you need.

reviews.name: Neeraj Varshney
reviews.review: My residential consultation practice has grown 3x since finishing this program. Truly advanced and truly worth it.

reviews.review: This is the most detailed residential Vastu course I have ever taken. I feel fully equipped to handle any residential Vastu case now.

reviews.name: Dinesh Kumar Jha
reviews.review: A masterclass in residential Vastu. Every session added something new and valuable to my knowledge bank. Highly recommended!

courses.title: Rudraksha Course
courses.one_liner: Learn the spiritual and astrological significance of different Rudraksha beads and how to recommend the right one for protection, growth, and success.
why_choose: Spiritual Knowledge Depth – Understand divine significance.
Astrological Application Skills – Planet-based recommendations.

courses.description: This course provides in-depth knowledge of Rudraksha beads, their spiritual importance, and planetary connections. You will learn how different Mukhi Rudrakshas influence specific life areas. The program teaches identification of authentic beads and proper wearing methods.

faqs.question: What will I learn about Rudraksha in this course — is it scientific or purely spiritual?
faqs.answer: The course covers Rudraksha from both traditional Vedic and energetic perspectives. You will learn the characteristics, ruling deities, and benefits of each Mukhi, how to identify authentic Rudrakshas, and the rules for wearing and activating them correctly.

faqs.question: Will this course teach me which Rudraksha is right for a specific person or problem?
faqs.answer: Yes, one of the most valuable sections of the course is learning how to recommend the right Rudraksha based on a person's birth chart, planetary afflictions, life challenges, and goals. This skill is extremely useful for astrologers and spiritual healers.

faqs.question: How many types of Rudraksha are covered in this course?
faqs.answer: The course covers 1 Mukhi through 14 Mukhi Rudrakshas in detail, along with special Rudrakshas like Gauri Shankar and Ganesh Rudraksha. Each type's properties, benefits, ruling planet, and method of wearing are explained thoroughly.

faqs.question: Can I start recommending Rudrakshas to clients after completing this course?
faqs.answer: Yes, the course is designed to make you capable of giving informed Rudraksha recommendations. Combined with astrological knowledge, this becomes a highly valuable and sought-after skill in spiritual consultation and healing.

faqs.question: Is there guidance on how to identify fake or low-quality Rudraksha beads?
faqs.answer: Absolutely — authentication is one of the key practical modules. You will learn the visual, tactile, and water-float tests used to identify genuine Rudrakshas, protecting both yourself and your clients from counterfeit products.

reviews.name: Madhuri Shinde
reviews.review: This course opened my eyes completely. Now I can guide my clients on the right Rudraksha confidently. Brilliant course!

reviews.name: Vikram Chandra
reviews.review: This is knowledge you simply cannot find in books. Very grateful for this course.

reviews.name: Bharti Awasthi
reviews.review: A unique and well-researched course. A must for astrologers, Vastu consultants, and spiritual practitioners who want to add Rudraksha recommendation to their skill set.
